description: CompositionBeige full length semi- formal trousers made of 100% cotton, has sflat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back, brand logo embroidered on the right hip pocket, metal zipper and button closure, and reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area and the hemlineFittingSlimWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachMachine wash coldTumble dry lowWarm iron"A man's class is raised by a bar with the trousers he wears" - or so, it is said. Choose your  trousers with much care because that defines who you are. scullers brings to you the classiest of semi-formal trousers, made from the choicest of selected fabrics, perfectly fitted for daily office wear. Pair it with a perfectly tailored formal shirt and leather shoes to look every bit like the corporate that you are.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 41.5"Height-6.1", waist-31"
